Docs.summary: Latency threshold in milliseconds before triggering interim response. Default is 2000ms.

MemberSignature.Value: public System.Collections.Generic.IList<Azure.AI.VoiceLive.InterimResponseTrigger> Triggers { get; }
.property instance class System.Collections.Generic.IList`1<valuetype Azure.AI.VoiceLive.InterimResponseTrigger> Triggers
Public ReadOnly Property Triggers As IList(Of InterimResponseTrigger)
member this.Triggers : System.Collections.Generic.IList<Azure.AI.VoiceLive.InterimResponseTrigger>

Docs.summary: List of triggers that can fire the interim response. Any trigger can activate it (OR logic). Supported: 'latency', 'tool'.
